tasks.subject: Task 1: Add Cyberpunk Theme to DefaultThemes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a new Cyberpunk built-in theme with neon cyan/dark blue palette.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/theme/DefaultThemes.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Cyberpunk theme exists with id "cyberpunk", category "colorful"
- Theme appears in the ALL list
- getById("cyberpunk") returns the Cyberpunk theme

**Verify:** `./gradlew assembleDebug` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/theme/DefaultThemes.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cyberpunk theme with id cyberpunk exists", "Theme in ALL list", "getById returns it"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add 80 Character Avatar Assets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 80 character avatar WebP images to drawable resources.

**Files:**
- Create: 80 WebP files in `app/src/main/res/drawable/`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 80 WebP files with correct naming convention
- ~280x280px, under 200KB each

**Verify:** File count check per category

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/res/drawable/"], "verifyCommand": "ls app/src/main/res/drawable/avatar_anime_*.webp | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["80 WebP files exist", "Correct naming convention"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Expand ProfileAssets with Categorized Avatar Map
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update ProfileAssets.kt with all 96 avatars organized by category.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileAssets.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AVATAR_MAP has 96 entries
- AVATAR_CATEGORIES provides ordered categories
- Existing avatar refs still resolve

**Verify:** `./gradlew assembleDebug` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileAssets.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["96 entries in AVATAR_MAP", "AVATAR_CATEGORIES defined", "Backward compatible"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update ProfileViewModel for 2-Step Wizard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change wizard from 4 steps to 3 steps with combined name+avatar method.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileViewModel.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- setWizardNameAndAvatar() sets both and advances to step 2
- Old methods removed

**Verify:** `./gradlew assembleDebug` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileViewModel.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setWizardNameAndAvatar exists", "Old methods removed", "goBackStep works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Build Combined WizardNameAvatarStep and Update ProfileScreen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace WelcomeView + WizardNameStep + WizardAvatarStep with WizardNameAvatarStep.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileScreen.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- WelcomeView removed
- Combined name+avatar screen works
- D-pad navigation works
- Auto-start wizard for first-time users

**Verify:** Build and test on emulator

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/lumera/app/ui/profiles/ProfileScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WelcomeView removed", "Combined screen works", "D-pad navigation", "Auto-start for new users"]}
```
